What We Do

Detail that speaks for itself

We come to you — fully equipped, professionally trained, and committed to delivering a showroom finish every time. Cars, trucks, boats — we handle it all.

🚗

Cars & Sedans

From compacts to luxury vehicles, every surface treated with the care it deserves.

🛻

Trucks & SUVs

Deep cleaning for work trucks and family SUVs alike — interior, exterior, and everything between.

⛵

Boats & Marine

Marine-grade detailing that protects your investment and restores the shine on every vessel.

Packages & Pricing

Choose your level of clean

Express Detail

$60+

Starting price · varies by vehicle size

  • Exterior hand wash & rinse
  • Windows cleaned inside & out
  • Tire & rim wipe down
  • Interior vacuum
  • Dash & console wipe
  • Door jambs cleaned
Book Express
Most Popular

Full Interior

$129

Flat rate · most vehicles

  • Deep interior vacuum (seats, carpet, trunk)
  • Shampoo carpets & floor mats
  • Seat cleaning & conditioning
  • Full dash, console & door panel detail
  • Windows inside & out
  • Air vents & crevice cleaning
  • Odour treatment
Book Full Interior

Premium Detail

$250+

Starting price · full detail experience

  • Everything in Full Interior
  • Full exterior wash, clay bar & polish
  • Paint decontamination & wax coat
  • Engine bay detail
  • Tire dressing & rim polish
  • Headlight restoration
  • Premium interior protectant
  • Boats & marine available
Book Premium

Our Work

The results say it all

About Us

Kane & Kane

Kane & Kane Auto Perfections is a fully mobile detailing service based out of Lacombe, Alberta. We bring professional-grade equipment and premium products directly to your home, workplace, or wherever your vehicle is parked.

"We don't just clean vehicles — we restore them to the condition they deserve."

Whether it's a daily driver, a show truck, or a marine vessel, we treat every job with the same standard: perfection. No shop required. No hassle. Just results.

Based In

Lacombe, AB

All Central Alberta
